title: Speculantha bicornis
intro: Speculantha bicornis, also known as Bicornis speculantha or Bicornis speculantha (Cass.) Benth., is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been found to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, wounds, and gastrointestinal issues. The bioactive constituents of Speculantha bicornis include flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin conditions.
taxonomy: Speculantha bicornis is a plant species in the family Gesneriaceae. It is a flowering plant native to Sri Lanka. The species is classified in the genus Speculantha. Further classification information is not readily available.
